fields.title: skill-manage: skill_manage tool registration
fields.description: Plan: docs/plans/2026-03-27-agentic-skill-creation.md — Task 4. Create skill-manage/index.ts — TypeBox params, pi.registerTool with initSkillManage(pi, runEffect). Includes nudging tool description with trigger heuristics.
fields.notes: Implemented extensions/tau/src/skill-manage/index.ts with the skill_manage tool schema, action validation, Effect dispatch to SkillManager, result formatting, and tagged error handling following the memory tool pattern. Verification: cd extensions/tau && npx tsc --noEmit passes; cd extensions/tau && npm run gate passes with lint clean and 146/146 tests.
